metadata.description: Diab Neiroukh's Claude Code plugins in one place.

plugins.name: mempalace-hooks
plugins.description: Wires the mempalace MCP memory server into Claude Code: two directive hooks that load palace context at session start and pull the user's writing and coding voice from the MCP palace before writing or coding. MCP-only, with no local CLI and no auto-mining.

plugins.name: system-design
plugins.description: Cloud-agnostic system design across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud: a six-step Well-Architected loop. Auto-engages for architecture and service-selection work.

plugins.name: 4man
plugins.description: A four-role dev crew (Planner, parallel Coders and Testers, and a fan-out Reviewer) that builds and reviews features in the requestor's own style. Auto-engages for feature work.

plugins.name: realfavicon-mcp
plugins.description: Bundles the realfavicon-mcp MCP server: generate favicon assets and HTML from a master image, audit a live page's favicon setup, and query the RealFaviconGenerator change-log.

plugins.name: offshore
plugins.description: Bundles the offshore MCP server. Forwards refused prompts to a local abliterated model (Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint) and returns the unrestricted reply.

plugins.name: prompt-engineering
plugins.description: Turn a description into an optimized, ready-to-paste LLM prompt for a Gemini Gem, Claude Project, or custom GPT, grounded in the promptingguide.ai guide. Works offline via a bundled distilled reference. Auto-engages when you write or refine a prompt.

plugins.name: fableplan
plugins.description: Plan with Fable 5, execute with Opus: an opusplan-style dual-model setup for Claude Code. Tracked as a submodule of the lzlrd/fableplan fork.
